product.name: UK Soldering Iron Kit Stand Solder Desolder Pump Sucker
product.description:
Soldering KitWhat's Included?Soldering Iron - 230V - 30W - 1.2m Lead - 1.3mm Diameter TipSoldering Stand - With Sponge5m Lead-Free Solder - 99.3% Tin, 0.7% CopperDe-Soldering PumpProtective Cover - for protecting the soldering iron when in a tool box, etcOverview - This kit is ideal for the home electronics hobbyist, it contains everything you need to get to grips with soldering.  Features - The 230v (30 watt) iron is a simple yet high quality unit that heats up quickly, and maintains a steady temperature while you’re working. It’s light and compact, ideal for those new to working with electronics, preventing you from struggling to join fine connections with a heavy-duty tip, or a cumbersome ‘gun’ type iron. The slender ‘pen’ style design is well balanced and easy to manoeuvre, making it an ideal learning tool.
The insulated stand protects your work surface from heat damage, and ensures you always have a safe, secure place to keep your iron when working. The stand also includes a cleaning sponge to remove excess solder from the iron’s tip, lower its temperature if necessary and help with ‘tinning’ the iron (coating the tip with a fine layer of solder).
Also included is a De-Soldering pump, sometimes referred to as a ‘Solder-Sucker.’ This small, syringe like device is intended for cleaning up any mistakes you might make, as well as cleaning molten solder off components or connections when replacing faulty parts, or removing them for use in another project.Some high quality, lead free solder that has a 2.2% flux concentration (helps prevent dry joints) is also included, so you’re ready to get started right out of the box, as well as a heat &amp; protection guard for the iron, great for if you need to pack up and move while it is still warm. 
Standards - CE and RoHS Compliant - ensures safety during use.

Designed specifically to fit the same 6-terminal backplate as the Honeywell ST9100C, ST9100A, ST6100A/C, and ST7100, it clips directly into place without the need for rewiring. This makes it the ideal drop-in replacement for homes already equipped with these legacy systems.

Once installed, the timer allows full customisation of your heating schedule with up to three ON/OFF cycles per day. It supports 24-hour, 5/2-day and full 7-day programming formats, offering flexibility for everyday routines. Commonly used with combi boilers and single-zone heating setups, this programmer is trusted by landlords, engineers, and homeowners for its simplicity and reliability.

The large backlit display features a clear, text-based interface that guides users through setup and shows live system status. Features such as Boost Mode, Manual Override, and Holiday Mode provide real-world convenience for modern households. All settings are retained even during power cuts thanks to the built-in memory, and the internal clock adjusts automatically for daylight saving time.

Built by Resideo, the same manufacturer behind Honeywell Home, the LavaTap Pro Controls timer delivers long-lasting performance and ease of use at an affordable price. It is backed by a 3-year warranty and is engineered to meet the demands of UK heating systems with quick, stress-free installation.

Note: This unit is only compatible with Honeywell ST-series backplates. It is not suitable for use with other brands like Drayton, Horstmann, or ESI unless rewired.

product.name: Effipro Duo Spot On Flea & Tick Treatment for Medium Dogs 10-20kg Fast Acting 4 Pipettes Vet Strength Formula Easy to Apply
product.description:
EFFIPRO DUO – Advanced Flea & Tick Protection for Medium Dogs 10-20kg

EFFIPRO DUO is the only flea and tick treatment combining PPF (pyriproxyfen) and fipronil, providing complete protection for your pet and home. It eliminates fleas and ticks while preventing the development of immature stages, offering up to 3 months of protection against flea multiplication in the environment.

Fleas in the environment are a serious concern for pets and owners. EFFIPRO DUO breaks the flea life cycle using PPF, an insect growth inhibitor, which sterilises adult fleas and stops eggs and larvae from developing. This prevents new fleas from emerging and protects your home from re-infestation.

High flea infestation rates are common – more than 70% of dogs and cats can be affected during flea season, and re-infestation is frequent, especially in cats. Even with regular treatment, many pets still carry fleas. EFFIPRO DUO provides an effective, long-term solution that keeps your pet protected and your home free of pests.

Key Benefits
• Unique Drop-Lock technology for precision application
• Provides 3 months of protection against the flea life cycle
• Sterilises adult fleas and inhibits immature stages to prevent re-infestation
• Kills fleas and ticks without the need for biting

Product Details
EFFIPRO DUO Spot-On Treatment protects your pet by targeting key stages of the flea life cycle. The dual-action formula ensures reliable results with every use. For maximum home protection, use alongside Indorex Defence Household Flea Spray, which kills hidden fleas in carpets and furnishings for up to 12 months.

Ingredients: Fipronil, Pyriproxyfen

product.name: Advantage Spot on Flea Treatment 80 for Large Cats and Rabbits - 4 Pipette
product.description:
Advantage Spot On Flea Treatment is an effective solution that can be used for both the treatment and prevention of flea infestations. Fleas are killed through contact and do not need to bite your pet to be eliminated. Advantage also kills flea larvae in the home, wherever the treated pet goes.
About Advantage
Fleas cause itching and irritation, carry diseases, and if your pet swallows one while grooming, they could get tapeworm. Only 5% of fleas live on your pet; the other 95% of their lifecycle occurs in carpets and bedding. If you discover fleas on your pet, you may need to treat your home as well.

Starts working quickly, eliminating fleas within 24 hours and continuing to protect cats for up to 4 weeks and rabbits for up to one week.

Once applied, Advantage spreads quickly across your pet's skin and coat. The product is not absorbed into the body or bloodstream, meaning that fleas do not have to bite to be eliminated.

How to Use
Advantage is a spot-on formulation. For large cats and rabbits, the contents of the pipette are applied directly to the skin by parting the fur at the base of the skull.

Instructions:
Use the Advantage product that is suitable for the weight of your pet.
Hold the tube in an upright position and twist and pull the cap to remove it. Use the reversed cap to twist and remove the seal from the tube.
For large cats and rabbits, apply the spot-on treatment to the back of the pet's neck at the base of the skull. Part the fur until the skin is visible and squeeze firmly to empty the contents of the tube. Applying the product to the base of the skull will minimise the opportunity for the pet to lick the treatment.
Administration Guide:
For large cats and pet rabbits over 4kg in body weight, use 1 pipette of Advantage Spot-On Flea Treatment for Large Cats and Rabbits Over 4kg (80mg).

Ingredients:
Contains Imidacloprid 80 mg/pipette.

Upgrade your home with the Arko Bathroom Suite, the ultimate full bathroom set combining sleek modern design, high practicality, and long-lasting durability. This comprehensive package includes everything you need to transform your space into a luxurious, contemporary retreat.

Included Fixtures & Fittings:

Arko Close Coupled Toilet: Features an ergonomic soft-close seat, water-saving dual flush cistern, and easy-clean ceramic with durable vitreous China coating.
Arko Single-Ended Curved Bath (1700mm): Constructed from scratch-resistant Lucite acrylic (135L capacity). The 1700mm side front panel is included (Note: end panel must be purchased separately).

Arko Full Pedestal Basin: A modern white ceramic basin with a single tap hole and matching black overflow ring, highly resistant to stains and scratches.

Arko Grid Shower Screen: 6mm safety glass with a stylish grid pattern and a 180° pivot for effortless access.

Black Thermostatic Shower: Bar mixer shower with thermostatic controls for precise temperature settings. Includes an adjustable rainfall drencher head (220mm) and a handheld shower handset (1500mm hose).

Arko Vista Taps: Stylish black basin mixer and bath mixer taps delivering a smooth water cascade.

Matching Wastes: Includes a click-clack bath waste and a slotted sprung basin waste.

Fittings & Fixings included for simple installation.

Key Features for a Sleek Look & Lasting Quality:

This contemporary single-ended bath is paired with sleek  accessories for a bold, striking look. The suite uses durable materials (acrylic, vitreous China) ensuring long-lasting quality and is suitable for high-pressure systems (Min 0.5 bar; Max 5.0 bar). Enjoy custom showering with dual shower heads and easy maintenance thanks to stain-resistant ceramic finishes.
